---
title: |
 <div class="title-container">
    <span class="title-text">
      Conservación y uso Sostenible <br> en Montañas y Sierras (CoSMoS)
    </span>
    <img src="Figuras2/CoSMoS_logo.png" alt="Logo de CoSMoS" class="title-logo">
  </div>


subtitle: "Capacitación para Monitoreo Comunitario de la Biodiversidad Faunística"


date-format: long
lang: es

css:
  - styles.css
  - https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css

header-includes: |
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;600;700&family=Open+Sans:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

  <meta name="description" content="Página interactiva sobre Conservación y uso Sostenible en Montañas y Sierras (CoSMoS).">
  <meta name="keywords" content="conservación, montañas, sierras, CoSMoS">
  <meta name="author" content="Arturo Zavaleta Aguilar">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

toc: true
toc-title: "Contenido"
toc-location: right
number-sections: true

format:
  html:
    title-block-banner: '#F1F1F2'
    title-block-banner-color: '#F1B24A'
    mainfont: "Open Sans"
    heading-font: "Montserrat"
    link-external-icon: true
    link-external-newwindow: true
    execute:
      echo: false
      warning: false
      message: false
      cache: true
    include-after-body: |
      <footer style="text-align: center; padding: 20px; background-color: #164a41; color: #F1B24A;">
        <p>&copy; 2026 Arturo Zavaleta Aguilar. Todos los derechos reservados.</p>
      </footer>
---


# Enlace de aplicaciones


[**KoboCollect**](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.koboc.collect.android&pcampaignid=web_share){style="font-size: 23px;"}


[**Canopy Capture**](https://d.apkpure.com/b/APK/com.nikhilpatel.canopycapture?version=latest){style="font-size: 23px;"}


[**Songmeter configurator**](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.wildlifeacoustics.SongMeterMiniConfigurator& pcampaignid=web_share){style="font-size: 23px;"}


[**Datalogger**](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.onsetcomp.HOBOconnect&pcampaignid=web _share){style="font-size: 23px;"}


[**Avanza Maps**](https://play.google.com/store/search?q=avenza%20maps&c=apps){style="font-size: 23px;"}


[**Locus Map**](https://play.google.com/store/search?q=locus+map&c=apps){style="font-size: 23px;"}
